source_url: 谈论vitamind，以及体积它不能从饮食补充，以及人们的缺乏，还有它对于健康的重要性，多方面：免疫系统、皮肤、骨骼等其他健康方面
english_script: Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 22 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English. Today I watched a video about Vitamin D. It talked about how we get it and why it matters. The video said that Vitamin D is different from other vitamins. We cannot get enough from food alone. Most of our Vitamin D comes from the sun. Many people do not have enough Vitamin D. This is a big health problem. The video shared some key points. First, Vitamin D helps our immune system. It helps us fight off sickness. Second, it is good for our skin. It can help with skin health and repair. Third, it keeps our bones strong. Without Vitamin D, our bones can become weak. This can lead to problems like bone pain. Fourth, Vitamin D is important for our mood. Low levels can make us feel sad. The video also explained who is at risk. People who stay inside a lot may lack Vitamin D. People with dark skin also need more sun. Older adults often have low levels too. The speaker said we should get some sun each day. But we must be careful not to get too much. A few minutes of sun on our arms and face can help. We can also eat foods like fish and eggs. But food alone is not enough. So the video was very helpful. I learned that Vitamin D is very important for many parts of health. We need to pay attention to our levels. Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
chinese_translation: 大家好，我是Lulu。我每天英语练习的第22天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。今天我看了关于维生素D的视频。它谈到了我们如何获取维生素D以及为什么它很重要。视频说维生素D和其他维生素不同。我们不能仅从食物中获得足够的维生素D。我们大部分的维生素D来自阳光。许多人没有足够的维生素D。这是一个很大的健康问题。视频分享了一些关键点。第一，维生素D帮助我们的免疫系统。它帮助我们抵抗疾病。第二，它对我们的皮肤有好处。它有助于皮肤健康和修复。第三，它保持我们的骨骼强壮。没有维生素D，我们的骨骼会变弱。这可能导致骨骼疼痛等问题。第四，维生素D对我们的情绪很重要。低水平会让我们感到难过。视频还解释了谁有风险。经常待在室内的人可能缺乏维生素D。肤色深的人也需要更多阳光。老年人也常常水平较低。演讲者说我们应该每天晒一点太阳。但我们必须小心不要晒太多。在手臂和脸上晒几分钟太阳会有帮助。我们也可以吃像鱼和鸡蛋这样的食物。但仅靠食物是不够的。所以这个视频很有帮助。我了解到维生素D对健康的很多方面都很重要。我们需要注意我们的水平。谢谢收听，明天见。
concise_english: Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 22 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English. Today I watched a video about Vitamin D. It said we cannot get enough Vitamin D from food. Most of it comes from the sun. Many people do not have enough. This is a problem. The video shared some key points. Vitamin D helps our immune system. It keeps our bones strong. It is good for our skin and mood. People who stay inside a lot may lack it. We should get a little sun each day. Eat fish and eggs too. But sun is the main source. I learned that Vitamin D is very important. Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
concise_chinese: 大家好，我是Lulu。我每天英语练习的第22天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。今天我看了关于维生素D的视频。它说我们不能仅从食物中获得足够的维生素D。大部分来自阳光。许多人没有足够的维生素D。这是一个问题。视频分享了一些关键点。维生素D帮助我们的免疫系统。它保持我们的骨骼强壮。它对我们的皮肤和情绪有好处。经常待在室内的人可能缺乏。我们应该每天晒一点太阳。也吃鱼和鸡蛋。但阳光是主要来源。我了解到维生素D非常重要。谢谢收听，明天见。
